title: Internal Authority Boost Day 3 (Phase 13C.4)
method: Added 10 new contextual internal links across blog posts, guide pages, and comparison pages. Priority targets: mortgage-affordability, compound-interest, core calculators, high-value guides.
summary: 10 new internal authority links reinforcing calculator hub rankings and topical relevance.

links_added.context: In 'How Rising Rates Affect Homebuyers' section — 'Use our mortgage affordability calculator to see how rate changes impact your buying power.'
In 'What the Data Means for Borrowers' section — 'Run the numbers with our free mortgage calculator to see your actual monthly payment.'
In 'Should You Buy Now or Wait?' section — 'Still deciding? Our rent vs buy calculator helps you compare the true costs.'

links_added.anchor: how much house you can afford
links_added.context: In intro paragraph — 'Check how much house you can afford at today's rates.'
In 'Taking It Further' section — 'Pair this with our investment return calculator to model a full portfolio.'
In 'Long-Term Planning' section — 'See how compound growth impacts your retirement timeline with our retirement planning calculator.'

links_added.anchor: how much house can I afford
links_added.context: In 'Next Steps' section — 'Ready to decide? Use our how much house can I afford decision guide.'
In 'Other Tools to Consider' section — 'Compare the best mortgage calculators to find the right one for your needs.'
In comparison table — 'Before choosing a calculator, determine your budget with our mortgage affordability calculator.'
In FAQ section — 'If you're still unsure whether to buy, check our buy vs rent decision guide.'
